title: Nexus WorldSnapshotRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/worlds/snapshot — capture a read-only snapshot cursor with optional branch and size limits (platform API).

at_event_id.description: Optional anchor event; when omitted, platform uses latest head for the world

branch_id.description: Optional ForkBranch scope for the snapshot

key_block_limit.description: Optional cap on key blocks included in snapshot payload shaping

timeline_event_limit.description: Optional cap on timeline events included in snapshot payload shaping
